Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Continued To Jun-08-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAVID LLORENS' Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is denied. While there is a policy of liberally allowing the filing of cross-complaints, that policy doesn't apply where, as here, there was unreasonable delay in seeking leave to file the cross-complaint, trial is imminent and allowing the cross-complaint would prejudice the plaintiff. Moreover, since plaintiff has stated that the proposed cross-complaint is permissive, not compulsory, it can be filed as a complaint in a separate lawsuit. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
